seoTitle: Stafford County Public Schools Calendar 2025-2026: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Stafford County Public Schools 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 12 first day, May 28 last day, holidays, breaks, staff work days, PDF and ICS download.
calendarNotes: Stafford County Public Schools starts the 2025-2026 school year with transition day for kindergarten, 6th grade, and 9th grade on August 11, followed by the first day for all grades on August 12. Winter Break runs December 22-January 2, Spring Break runs March 30-April 3, and the last day of school is May 28, 2026. The calendar also lists make-up day procedures that may convert certain non-school days if required instructional time falls short.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Stafford County start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Stafford County Public Schools starts all grades on Tuesday, August 12, 2025. Transition day for kindergarten, 6th grade, and 9th grade is Monday, August 11.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Stafford County Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break on the Stafford County 2025-2026 calendar runs Monday, March 30 through Friday, April 3, 2026. Easter Break is listed separately on Monday, April 6.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Stafford County in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Stafford County Public Schools is Thursday, May 28, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: Which Stafford 2025-2026 dates may be used as make-up days?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar lists February 13, March 13, March 20, and April 6 as possible conversion days if make-up time is needed.

yearNumbers.label: Transition Day
yearNumbers.detail: Kindergarten, 6th grade, and 9th grade start one day before the all-grades first day.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Stafford schedules a five-weekday spring break followed by Easter Break on April 6.

yearNumbers.label: Potential Make-Up Days
yearNumbers.detail: The PDF lists February 13, March 13, March 20, and April 6 as dates that may be converted if instructional time is short.
